title: Raid on the Mummer bunker

{{Quote|It's time to hit the Mummers at their base. If we, and by we I mean you, can hit them hard enough, the Mummers will be unable to consider future terrorist attacks. At least for a while, anyway.|[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Harriet Brunser|Brunser]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BTttT" />}}
The '''Raid on the Mummers' bunker''' was a mission delegated to agents of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
{{Quote|We identified the terrorists almost immediately; it was the Mummers. They never suspected that their communications were tapped, or maybe they just didn't care.|Sergeant [[Mercious Bragg|Bragg]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TtCotFMCG" />}}
While known as a peaceful haven prior to the rule of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] became infested with criminal gangs and organizations during the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. At the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Mummers]] were a strong presence on the planet. [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Mercious Bragg|Bragg]] of the [[RSF Intelligence Division]] had gathered that, in addition to their usual bootlegging, the Mummers were involved in a [[Terrorist attack in Theed|terrorist attack]] in the capital city of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]].<ref name="SWG:TtCotFMCG" /> [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|RSF]] officer [[Harriet Brunser]] came up with a simple plan to solve this problem: namely, to raid the Mummers' [[Mummer bunker|headquarters]] outside of Theed.<ref name="SWG:BTttT" /> However, Mummers were known to often use toxins in combat. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Karenna Dunnels|Dunnels]], a RSF [[Science officer/Legends|science officer]], was thus tasked to produce [[Stimulant/Legends|neural boosters]] to help protect against the Mummers' toxins during the attack.<ref name="SWG:HLDwitmNB" />

==The raid==
{{Quote|Start by going to their base and softening up their defenses. After that, you'll go after their leadership, but I'll let you know when to pursue that.|Sergeant Brunser, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BTttT" />}}
Brunser dispatched an unknown number of RSF troopers to raid the bunker in a mission consisting of three stages. The objective of the first stage was to thin the Mummer numbers by eliminating some of its most dangerous members. From her command post in the [[Theed Hangar/Legends|Theed Hangar]], Brunser ordered the RSF agents to specifically aim at killing Mummer Salvers, Toxers, and Banes, whom she considered to be essential to the Mummers' terror operation.<ref name="SWG:BTttT" />

[[File:MummerBunkerInterior.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Mummers in their bunker just before the raid.]]
Having disposed of a large proportion of Mummers, the RSF agents were ordered by Brunser to locate and disarm nine dangerous biochemical bombs, which were scattered all over the Mummer base. The bombs were intended to be an integral part of the Mummers' terror operation. Subsequently, the RSF agents received an order from Brunser to locate and destroy the local Mummer leaders, the [[Chief Scientist/Legends|Chief Scientist]] [[Crimsol Vaighn]] and the [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Jaye Hawkson]]. The RSF agents succeeded in assassinating both leaders, and subsequently escaping the base.<ref name="SWG:BTttT" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Excellent work, trooper. The terrorists have been neutralized. I think the Mummers will be less of a problem for quite a while.|Sergeant Brunser, to a trooper|<ref name="SWG:BTttT" />}}
The raid left the Mummers severely crippled, rendering them unable to complete their planned terror operations.<ref name="SWG:BTttT" /> The RSF agents were recommended and were dispatched on many other [[Rescue of Karl Eckener|missions]] against the Mummers and the other criminal organizations pestering the lives of the peaceful residents of Naboo.<ref name="SWG:RKE" />
